response.reasoning: The role is a director-level IC focused on AI strategy, requiring 15+ years of experience, recognized AI expertise, and the ability to advise strategic customers and inspire others externally on cloud and AI. Step 1 — Experience depth: Bogdan has ~17 years of professional software engineering (2009–2026) or ~20 if counting 2006 freelance work, clearing the 15-year minimum. Step 2 — AI credentials: The only directly AI-relevant work is at re:cinq (April 2025–present), covering MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks. This is real and current, but spans roughly 14 months and does not constitute a track record of building recognized AI products or platforms. Step 3 — Cloud depth: AWS CDK appears briefly at Optilyz; there is no substantial cloud platform design or architecture experience at scale. Step 4 — Seniority/leadership signal: Titles are Staff and Senior Software Engineer. The GISCollective founder role and workshop/conference activity show community engagement, but there is no evidence of strategic advisory relationships, external thought leadership at scale, or the organizational influence expected of a director-level IC. Step 5 — Education: Two bachelor's degrees; no master's or PhD, and none in an AI-related field. The preferred advanced degree is absent. Step 6 — Overall: Strong generalist engineering background with a promising but very recent pivot toward AI tooling. The gap to 'recognized AI expertise with demonstrated products' and 'advise strategic customers on cutting-edge AI' is substantial.
strengths: ~17–20 years of polyglot engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, infrastructure, and developer tooling — exceeds the 15-year floor
Active AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq (MCP frameworks, agentic workflows) demonstrates hands-on, current engagement with the AI tooling space
Demonstrated entrepreneurial instinct through GISCollective founding and consistent community contribution via public talks and multi-day workshops
concerns: AI expertise is concentrated in the last ~14 months; no track record of shipped AI products or platforms that would constitute 'recognized expertise' at the level this role demands
No advanced degree (master's or PhD) in an AI-related field, a preferred qualification that signals the depth of theoretical and strategic AI knowledge the role expects
Titles and work history reflect individual technical contribution rather than director-level strategic advisory, external customer influence, or organizational leadership at scale
response.justification: Bogdan is a skilled, experienced generalist engineer with a genuine and recent foray into AI tooling, but the Principal Engineer (AI Strategy) role requires a candidate who has already built a recognized body of AI work, can credibly advise enterprise customers on cloud and AI strategy, and operates at director-level organizational influence. His AI work is too nascent, his cloud depth too thin, and his visible leadership footprint too narrow to meet those bars today.
